title: hieracium acroxanthum
intro: Hieracium acroxanthum, also known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The plant is known to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium acroxanthum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
